reason: Verified that the browser-use feature allows agents to open browsers, navigate to URLs, retrieve page titles, and report results correctly via browser tool calls.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Gamut home page with agent list.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260717-030744-hoyz" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened with chat interface ready.
Clicked the message input box and typed "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was entered in the textbox.
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent successfully and agent status changed from "idle" to "working".
Waited for the agent to complete the task (up to 180 seconds) — Agent completed in 11 seconds.

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — Response confirmed: "The page title is \"Example Domain\"." and "The page at https://example.com loaded successfully and its title is \"Example Domain\". Browser closed."

Took final screenshot showing the complete conversation with all tool calls (Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser) and the final response — All browser tools executed successfully with checkmarks indicating completion.
